bird.name: 铜翅鸭
bird.summary: 铜翅鸭（学名：Speculanas specularis），是雁形目鸭科的一种鸟类。 特征 铜翅鸭体重约1496.07克，翼长约261.8毫米，嘴峰长约52.2毫米，喙宽度约19.3毫米，喙厚度约15.9毫米，跗蹠长约44.3毫米，尾长约108.6毫米。铜翅鸭在其分布区内为留鸟…

relations.subject: 铜翅鸭
relations.evidence: As noted by Johnsgard (2010): "Most observers agree that heavily forested rivers that are relatively swift-flowing are the preferred habitat of this species, although they also occur on slow-moving rivers and on pools or ponds of the adjoining forest areas
relations.object_summary: 冷水、清澈且流速较高的繁殖河流环境。
